pathFamilyReferenceLabelSupport.playerMeaning: Aurora path families can now be judged against committed Galaga contact-sheet labels, but not yet against tracked reference trajectories or rack-slot coordinates.

pathFamilyReferenceTrajectoryComparison.playerMeaning: Aurora now has an active vector/rack comparison, but the paths are not yet close enough to Galaga reference vectors to lift the broad label-backed cap.

weakestMetric.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
weakestMetric.calculation: Media-backed path-family comparison score from extracted runtime trajectories and accepted Galaga contact-sheet labels, capped below future tracked reference-trajectory comparison.
weakestMetric.currentRead: 680 tracks classified into path families; expected family coverage 1; accepted Galaga labels 6 regular / 4 challenge; trajectory-vector/rack score 5.5/10 (reference-trajectory-vector-comparison-active-no-cap-lift); cap 8.2/10 (media-backed-reference-label-cap).
weakestMetric.success: Runtime boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available first, then promoted to direct reference comparison against Galaga path families.

strongestMetric.label: Formation settle evidence
strongestMetric.calculation: 55% regular-window formation-active settle proxy plus 45% runtime rack/challenge slot-coordinate extraction coverage.
strongestMetric.currentRead: 7/7 regular windows expose formation-active counts; path-slot extraction found 680 slot tracks.
strongestMetric.success: Evidence captures formation-active counts and, in the next scorer version, target rack slot geometry by stage.

summary.topProblem: Boss/escort path-shape precision now has media-backed Galaga path-family labels; the next cap is tracked reference trajectory and rack-slot comparison.
summary.strategy: Promote boss/escort/challenge path traces, formation slot coordinates, and stage-family entry labels into the ingestion corpus, then use this scorer to rank stage scripts and runtime changes.
summary.successMeasure: Raise this family above 8.0/10 with path-shape precision above 5.0/10, minimum regular-stage signature distance above 0.16, and at least two challenge windows with distinct pattern identity.

metrics.label: Boss entry timing
metrics.calculation: 35% regular-window boss presence plus 65% first boss timing fit against early/mid/late stage-band timing windows.
metrics.currentRead: 7/7 regular windows expose boss presence; mean timing fit 0.857.
metrics.success: Regular-stage boss appearances land in stage-band timing windows and vary enough over time to feel authored.

metrics.label: Boss escort composition
metrics.calculation: 60% boss-plus-escort windows versus target count plus 40% regular-window escort-start coverage.
metrics.currentRead: 5 regular windows contain both boss and escort signals; 5/7 regular windows have escort starts.
metrics.success: Mid/late windows include visible boss and escort relationships rather than isolated boss dives only.

metrics.label: Formation settle evidence
metrics.calculation: 55% regular-window formation-active settle proxy plus 45% runtime rack/challenge slot-coordinate extraction coverage.
metrics.currentRead: 7/7 regular windows expose formation-active counts; path-slot extraction found 680 slot tracks.
metrics.success: Evidence captures formation-active counts and, in the next scorer version, target rack slot geometry by stage.

metrics.label: Challenge-stage pattern identity
metrics.calculation: Challenge window coverage, required challenge event-family presence, enemy-family variety, and boss signal.
metrics.currentRead: 4/4 challenge windows; required-family average 1; boss signal 1.
metrics.success: Challenge stages show wave start, path, hit, result, boss/family variety, and bonus-learning opportunities.

metrics.label: Stage-to-stage formation variation
metrics.calculation: 55% closest regular-stage signature distance against minimum target plus 45% distinct-pair ratio.
metrics.currentRead: Minimum regular distance 0.261; distinct pair ratio 1.
metrics.success: Nearby regular stages maintain signature distance above the repetition-risk threshold and show visibly different alien entry formations, rack timing, and path methods.

metrics.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
metrics.calculation: Media-backed path-family comparison score from extracted runtime trajectories and accepted Galaga contact-sheet labels, capped below future tracked reference-trajectory comparison.
metrics.currentRead: 680 tracks classified into path families; expected family coverage 1; accepted Galaga labels 6 regular / 4 challenge; trajectory-vector/rack score 5.5/10 (reference-trajectory-vector-comparison-active-no-cap-lift); cap 8.2/10 (media-backed-reference-label-cap).
metrics.success: Runtime boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available first, then promoted to direct reference comparison against Galaga path families.
